flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Augusta Technical College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.6k → $7.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Augusta Technical College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $4.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 14 pp at Augusta Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (30.8% vs 44.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Augusta Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.3% → 0.0%).
